texto: I wanted to emulate my parents - Mum captained India in basketball, and Dad won a bronze in hockey in 1972 Olympics. My focus has always been to achieve excellence whether in the field of tennis, in the corporate field, in the art of acting or in motivating youngsters.
explicacao: Citação de Leander Paes sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “I wanted to emulate my parents - Mum captained India in basketball, and Dad won a bronze in hocke…” articula motivacao, art, excellence em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como excellence e parents.
